summary: Implement official GESP source ingestion from canonical registry entries, store metadata-only discovered official pages and PDFs, and validate session/PDF coverage.
approach: Read canonical official sources from the source registry.
Fetch official pages and same-host PDF attachments with a metadata-only policy.
Persist URL, title, publication/session metadata, content type, hash, byte length, and source relationships.
Validate that official sessions, sample attachments, and PDF metadata are present without storing full content.

confidence.pressure_pass: Network access and upstream page changes are the highest-risk area; validator checks metadata-only output and minimum session/PDF coverage.

notes: This phase does not parse problem statements from PDFs.
This phase stores metadata and hashes only.
Official source ingestion required network access.
